original_abstract: This research aims to describe the implementation of a text-rich environment in PAUD units and its impact on children's language development. The research method used is qualitative with a case study approach. Research subjects at PAUD Shafa Marwah. Data collection was carried out through observation, interviews and documentation. The research results show that the implementation of a text-rich environment at PAUD Shafa Marwah has gone well. Children show high interest in the reading materials provided and actively interact with the text. This has a positive impact on children's language development, both in terms of vocabulary, reading comprehension and speaking ability. Keywords: Text-rich environment; language development; early childhood
humanized_abstract: The objective of this research is to explain the implementation of text-rich environment in PAUD institutions and children’s language development. This research used qualitative approach with case study method. The subject of this research is children in PAUD Shafa Marwah. The data was collected by observing, interviewing and collecting documentation. The results showed that the implementation of the text-rich environment in PAUD Shafa Marwah went well. Children have shown great enthusiasm towards the reading materials provided and they are actively interacting with the text. This causes the improvement of children’s language development in terms of vocabulary, reading skill, and speaking skill. Keywords: Text-rich environment; language development; early childhood
